improvement_design.baseline_summary: EMCAD baseline uses a single 1x1 prediction head after decoder refinement.
improvement_design.improvement_change: Replace the single prediction head with a learnable multi-branch fusion head.
improvement_design.expected_benefit: Improve final decoder output aggregation without changing the whole backbone and decoder stack.

comparison_summary.difference: Replace the single prediction head with a multi-branch learnable fusion head

notes: The current lightweight improvement did not surpass the EMCAD baseline on ETIS.
